clusters.justification: These terms share co-activation within the anterior insula, anterior cingulate, and subcortical structures, reflecting the overarching processing of emotional valence, physiological arousal, and mood states.
Mapping onto the overarching orbitofrontal-striatal circuitry, these concepts are bound by the macroscopic computation of subjective utility, reward prediction, and goal-directed behavioral drive.

These terms strongly co-activate cortical midline structures and the temporoparietal junction, united by the internally directed generation of abstract representations involving the self, personal histories, and the mental states of others.
